differentials.raw: Fluid attenuation of chronic otitis media

context: =  KERATOMA = EPIDERMOID =  epithelium-lined sac characterized by accumulation of desquamated keratin epithelium → bone destruction by pressure + increase in osteoclastic activity Location:   middle ear cavity, other pneumatized portions of temporal bone Histo:       (a)   acellular keratin debris = content of sac (b)  matrix = biologically active sac lining consisting of ›  inner layer of keratinizing squamous epithelium ›  outer layer of subepithelial connective tissue (= perimatrix) producing proteolytic enzymes → bone resorption √  NO enhancement Cx:     (1)  Infection → malodorous dischar
